title: What Is an AI Chief Business Officer (CBO)?
excerpt: Your business needs consistent content, social media, and lead generation — but executing all three while running the company is nearly impossible. An AI CBO closes that gap.

title: How AgentGrow Works: From Sign-Up to Your First Published Post
excerpt: Getting a dedicated AI agent working on your business takes less than an hour. Here is the complete walkthrough from choosing a plan to reading your first activity report.

title: How to Review and Approve Your Agent's Content
excerpt: Your AI CBO creates content based on your business profile. Before anything goes live, it appears in your dashboard for review. Here is how the approval workflow operates.

title: AI CBO vs. Hiring a Marketing Team: The Real Numbers
excerpt: Building a content and marketing operation in-house takes time and money. Here is how the cost, speed, and output of an AI CBO compare to a traditional marketing hire.

title: How to Get Your Facebook & Instagram Credentials for AgentGrow
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to getting your Facebook Page ID, Page Access Token, and Instagram Account ID so your AI agent can post on your behalf.

title: How to Set Up Blog Publisher (GitHub Pages) for AgentGrow
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to creating a GitHub repository and Personal Access Token so your AI agent can publish blog posts to your website via GitHub Pages.

title: How to Set Up SEO Analyst (Google Search Console) for AgentGrow
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to creating a Google Cloud service account and granting Search Console access so your AI agent can monitor your SEO performance.

title: How to Set Up LinkedIn Posting for AgentGrow
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to creating a LinkedIn app, getting an access token with w_member_social scope, and configuring your AI agent to post on your LinkedIn profile.

title: How to Configure Your Agent Modules on the Integrations Page
excerpt: A complete guide to the AgentGrow Integrations page — self-configure blog, social, SEO, and email modules, request admin setup for complex modules, and pause or resume any module.

title: Your Client Dashboard: A Complete Walkthrough
excerpt: A guided tour of the AgentGrow client dashboard — agent status, KPI goals with sparklines, approval queue, activity feed, prospect pipeline, and ROI tracking.

title: How to Set Up Email Marketing for AgentGrow
excerpt: Choose between platform-managed email (recommended, zero setup) or bring your own SMTP credentials. Configure email outreach for your AI agent in minutes.

title: How to Update Your Agent Settings and CBO Setup Form
excerpt: Re-edit your business details, ICP, and brand voice after onboarding. Connect platforms via Integrations. Changes trigger agent re-briefing so your CBO stays aligned with your strategy.

title: How to Upload and Manage Your Brand Kit
excerpt: Upload logos, brand guidelines, images, and creative briefs to your AgentGrow brand kit. Your AI agent uses these assets to maintain consistent branding across all content.

title: What 3 Months of Inconsistent Content Does to Your Business (And Why Most SMB Owners Never Recover)
excerpt: You had good reasons to pause content. Google didn't care. Here's the invisible damage inconsistent publishing does to your SEO and pipeline — and how to fix it without adding to your plate.

title: How to Connect LinkedIn (OAuth) for AgentGrow
excerpt: Create a LinkedIn App, paste the Client ID and Secret, and click Connect. AgentGrow handles token exchange and automatic refresh — no manual token management required.
